sections.label: Technique
sections.placeholder: Multidetector CT of the coronary arteries acquired after intravenous iodinated contrast. Multiplanar reformats reviewed. State kVp/contrast volume/phase and DLP as per local dose policy.

sections.label: Comparison
sections.placeholder: Date and type of relevant prior imaging, if available.

sections.label: Findings
sections.placeholder:
Coronary dominance and anomalies: 
Left main: 
LAD (proximal/mid/distal, diagonals): 
LCx (and OMs): 
RCA (and PDA): 
Per-vessel maximal stenosis grade (CAD-RADS 2.0: 0 none, 1 minimal 1–24%, 2 mild 25–49%, 3 moderate 50–69%, 4 severe 70–99% [4A / 4B-left main], 5 occluded) and plaque type: 
Plaque burden (P1–P4) and modifiers (N non-diagnostic, HRP high-risk plaque, I ischaemia/CT-FFR, S stent, G graft): 
Overall CAD-RADS category: 
Calcium (Agatston) score (if performed): 
Cardiac chambers / valves / pericardium:

sections.label: Impression
sections.placeholder: Concise, prioritised bulleted impression. Lead with the overall per-patient CAD-RADS 2.0 category (0–5, from the most severe vessel) plus plaque burden (P1–P4) and active modifiers (N/HRP/I/S/G), then the guideline-aligned management tier; close with approved follow-up phrasing only.

sections.label: Recommendations
sections.placeholder: Evidence-based follow-up or correlation, drawn from approved phrasing, only if indicated.
